hero.label: Kariera
hero.title:
Buduj coś,
co ma znaczenie.
hero.description: Jesteśmy 10-osobowym zespołem budującym atmosferyczny FPS w stylu noir lat 30. Jeśli zależy ci na gamedevie — chcielibyśmy cię poznać.

roles.title: Sound Designer
roles.about: NoSaints needs a voice — weapon SFX, atmospheric ambience, UI audio feedback, and spatial sound for our noir 1930s world. This is a critical gap that directly blocks development progress.
tasks: Design weapon firing and reload sound effects
Create ambient soundscapes (1930s city streets, interiors, rain)
Design UI audio feedback (menu clicks, notifications, HUD cues)
Implement spatial audio for multiplayer environments
Create impact and destruction sound effects

roles.title: QA Lead
roles.about: Lead the quality assurance process for NoSaints. You'll design test plans, triage bugs, coordinate playtest sessions, and determine build stability for release milestones.
tasks: Design test plans for each development milestone
Coordinate playtest sessions with the team
Verify bug fixes and run regression testing
Assess build stability and release readiness

roles.title: QA Testers
roles.about: Help us find and squash bugs across all game systems. You'll execute test cases, reproduce issues, and ensure stability across platforms.
tasks: Execute test cases across the game.
Report and reproduce bugs with clear reproduction steps
Test multiplayer stability and edge cases
Perform compatibility and performance testing across platforms

roles.title: Music Composer
roles.about: Compose the soundtrack for a noir 1930s alternative USA — jazz-inflected, moody, and atmospheric. From the main theme to adaptive in-game loops that respond to combat and exploration.
tasks: Compose main theme and menu music
Create adaptive in-game music (combat, exploration, tension)
Mix and master all music tracks
tools: DAW of choice (Ableton, FL Studio, Reaper)
FMOD or Wwise for adaptive audio
